source_name: MentalDistress: A multi-class social media text dataset for mental health-related emotion detection
why_use_it: Primary source: contains English text and class labels; suitable for NLP classification.
our_use: Use Others, Frustrated, and Anxious to create Low/Medium/High stress labels; exclude Suicidal and Depressed for a safer first version.

source_name: Dreaddit: A Reddit Dataset for Stress Analysis in Social Media
license: ACL Anthology / teaching and research use based on page terms
why_use_it: Secondary source: well-known stress-detection benchmark with Reddit text segments.
expected_columns: text, label, subreddit, post_id, confidence, etc.
known_size: 3.5K labeled segments from 3K posts; paper also describes 190K raw posts
our_use: Optional supplement for Low and High only; not ideal alone because it has no Medium stress class.

source_name: Stress Indicators Dataset for Mental Health Classification
why_use_it: Useful for domain knowledge and possible tabular extension, but not primary because it is mostly Likert-scale survey features rather than open text.
our_use: Backup/reference only; not primary for text classification.
